description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/paddy-hack/nikola Docker image. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, executes nikola --version in before_script, then runs nikola theme -i hack, OPTIMUM_SHELL_RELEASE=1 nikola build, and mkdir public && mv output/* public, and publishes the public directory as a Pages artifact. Add a test job in the test stage that runs nikola --version in before_script and then runs nikola theme -i hack followed by OPTIMUM_SHELL_RELEASE=1 nikola build. No caches, services, or additional variables are required.
